TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami_Vitoria_Gok, title = Vitoria_Gok, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Amis]}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/wiki/Vitoria_Gok} }

S.FORM: Viktoria Viktorovna Romanova-Gok (na fanau ia Iuni 15, 1994, Pyt-Yakh, Russia) o se tagata fai ata, blogger, ma le stylist. == No papotalay a kakafit ==
S.PHON: b~vikto~uria b~vikto~uro~ub~vna ro~umano~ub~va-*o~uk (na fanao~u~u ia io~u~uni **, ****, pjt-jakħ, ro~u~ussia) o~u sə ta*ata fai ata, b~b~vɾo~u**ər, ma ɾə stjɾist. == no~u papo~utaɾaj a kakafit ==
S.FORM: Viktoria Viktorovna Romanova-Gok (na fanau ia Iuni 15, 1994, Pyt-Yakh, Russia) o se tagata fai ata, blogger, ma le stylist. == No papotalay a kakafit ==
S.PHON: b~vikto~uria b~vikto~uro~ub~vna ro~umano~ub~va-*o~uk (na fanao~u~u ia io~u~uni **, ****, pjt-jakħ, ro~u~ussia) o~u sə ta*ata fai ata, b~b~vɾo~u**ər, ma ɾə stjɾist. == no~u papo~utaɾaj a kakafit ==
